property.name: java.library.path
property.value: C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\WINDOWS\Sun\Java\bin;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\WINDOWS\system32;C:\WINDOWS;C:\WINDOWS\System32\Wbem;C:\WINDOWS\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\WINDOWS\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21\bin;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files\nodejs\;C:\Users\tijar\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;C:\Program Files\apache-maven-3.9.11\bin;C:\Program Files\MySQL\MySQL Shell 8.0\bin\;C:\Users\tijar\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users\tijar\AppData\Roaming\npm;C:\Users\tijar\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code\bin;C:\Users\tijar\AppData\Local\Android\Sdk\platform-tools;;.

testcase.name: runScenario["Fill the form details", "Interact will all GUI Element"](1)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Fill the form details &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/blogSpotAutomation/guiElements.feature:5&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22muser is at BlogSpot Automation page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.driverinit()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser enters the name as &amp#27;[1m"Rohit Sharma"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_enters_the_name_as(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser enters the email as &amp#27;[1m"rohitsharma@abc.com"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_enters_the_email_as(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser enter the phoneNumber as &amp#27;[1m"9876543210"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_enter_the_phone_number_as(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser enters the address as &amp#27;[1m"hyper street, DC"&amp#27;[22m&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_enters_the_address_as(java.lang.String)&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22muser close the Browser&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.tearDown()&amp#27;[39m
testcase.system-err: SLF4J(W): No SLF4J providers were found. SLF4J(W): Defaulting to no-operation (NOP) logger implementation SLF4J(W): See https://www.slf4j.org/codes.html#noProviders for further details. testcase.name: runScenario["Radio and Dropdown", "Interact will all GUI Element"](2)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m Radio and Dropdown &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/blogSpotAutomation/guiElements.feature:12&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22muser is at BlogSpot Automation page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.driverinit()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser select the gender as male&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_select_the_gender_as_male()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser select the days as monday and wednesday&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_select_the_days_as_monday_and_wednesday()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser select China from the dropdown&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_select_china_from_the_dropdown()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22muser close the Browser&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.tearDown()&amp#27;[39m

testcase.name: runScenario["List on webpage", "Interact will all GUI Element"](3)
testcase.system-out: &amp#27;[1mScenario:&amp#27;[22m List on webpage &amp#27;[90m# src/test/resources/blogSpotAutomation/guiElements.feature:18&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mGiven &amp#27;[22muser is at BlogSpot Automation page&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.driverinit()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mWhen &amp#27;[22muser selects green color&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_selects_green_color()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mAnd &amp#27;[22muser selects Dog&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.user_selects_dog()&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m✔&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[32m&amp#27;[1mThen &amp#27;[22muser close the Browser&amp#27;[39m &amp#27;[90m# blogSpotAutomation.GuiElementForm.tearDown()&amp#27;[39m
